title: sia-autoresearch claims ledger
description: Contract for notes/claims.json — the structured beliefs of the lab. One entry per load-bearing claim, not per observation. Runs read relevant active claims as priors before researching (spec section 9 step 2) and write deltas after the verdict (step 16). Agents self-validate by reading this file — no tooling required.

statement.description: The belief, stated falsifiably — one sentence a future run can confirm or contradict

confidence.description: 0.00-1.00 — honest, conservative; update when runs confirm or weaken the claim

status.description: active = current prior; revised = superseded (link supersededBy); contradicted = counter-evidence won, keep the entry; expired = past reviewBy without re-verification

sourceRun.description: Run id that formed the claim: YYYY-MM-DD-<kind>-NNN

lastReviewed.description: Last run or meta-review that confirmed, revised, or re-verified this claim

reviewBy.description: Staleness date — default 3 months from dateFormed, shorter for fast-moving topics; meta-reviews re-verify or expire claims past this date

supersededBy.description: Claim id (clm-NNN) that replaces this one when status is revised

evidence.description: Source-registry ids (config/sources/sources.json) backing this claim — claim-level provenance
